narrative.description: Super Mario Run (2016) is a acclaimed platformer title recognized in retro gaming lists for its distinctive mechanics, pacing, and lasting influence on the genre.
narrative.core_loop: Traverse stages, overcome hazards, defeat bosses, and unlock new areas.
